input.content:
# Chinook Top 5 Customers by Total Spend

Approach: Join Customer -> Invoice -> InvoiceLine to sum UnitPrice*Quantity per customer, then order by total_spent and take top 5. Assumptions: UnitPrice in InvoiceLine reflects the line item price; City is stored in Customer; names concatenated as FirstName || ' ' || LastName.

SQL used (SQLite syntax):
```
SELECT (c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName) AS customer_name,
       c.City,
       SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS total_spent
FROM [Customer] AS c
JOIN [Invoice] AS i ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId
JOIN [InvoiceLine] AS il ON il.InvoiceId = i.InvoiceId
GROUP BY c.CustomerId, customer_name, c.City
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 5;
```

Results:

| customer_name | City | total_spent |
|---|---|---|
| Helena Holý | Prague | 49.62 |
| Richard Cunningham | Fort Worth | 47.62 |
| Luis Rojas | Santiago | 46.62 |
| Ladislav Kovács | Budapest | 45.62 |
| Hugh O'Reilly | Dublin | 45.62 |
